query:
SELECT
            g::date::text AS day,
            COALESCE(SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS tokens
        FROM generate_series(
            (NOW() - INTERVAL '13 days')::date,
            NOW()::date,
            INTERVAL '1 day'
        ) g
        LEFT JOIN threads t ON t.created_at::date = g::date
        GROUP BY g::date
        ORDER BY g::date
